role_justifications.conductor: classifies the REDO and enforces real delegation
role_justifications.planner: defines the measurement and progress gate
role_justifications.change_verifier: verifies no CSS source changes and stale artifact deletion
role_justifications.a11y_auditor: checks no accessibility risk from measurement-only outcome
role_justifications.critic: reviews the Phase 1 stop condition and evidence
role_justifications.acceptance_gate: independently validates final evidence and verdict
